title: SCHEDE PRATICHE PER AIUTARE GLI ALLEVATORI NELLA GESTIONE DELLA BIOSICUREZZA NEGLI ALLEVAMENTI
description: This document provides practical fact sheets to help poultry farmers implement biosafety regulations by simplifying French biosafety requirements into easy-to-use guidelines. It supports farmers in drafting risk-based biosecurity plans tailored to their production categories and farm-specific situations with recommendations and supporting materials.
